purpose: Local inpaint no-mouth v4 robustness sample using the current identity-preserving micro-mask workflow with a distinct seed.

request_patch_values.positive_prompt: subtle photoreal skin texture refinement, preserve exact identity, preserve original eye color gaze and lip color, natural skin pores, consistent portrait lighting, no global style drift
request_patch_values.negative_prompt: blank face, gray mask, identity change, eye color change, lip color change, gaze drift, face shape drift, plastic skin, waxy skin, over-smoothed face, distorted eyes, crossed eyes, extra teeth, deformed mouth, new jewelry, new clothing, background change, watermark, text
